data.body:
the notification has two problems
- doesn't show the project prefix - which it needs to because it can be from a different project
- when it's from a different project, clicking on the bead id link doesn't work because foolery looks in the active project - not the actual project of the bead.  in this case foolery shoudl switch projects and then loook for the bead.
data.title: clicking on beat link in notification from different project results in "beat not found"
